name: The Ember Relic
summary: Recover the Sunstone from the Ashen Ruin and return it to Emberfall.

stages.title: Cross the Greenwild
stages.description: Leave Emberfall to the east and reach the Ashen Ruin.

stages.title: Return the Sunstone
stages.description: Carry the Sunstone back to Elder Mira in Emberfall.

stages.title: The Town Endures
stages.description: The Sunstone rests once more in Emberfall's warding hearth.
